pillars.title: Open Science
pillars.summary: Publication, data, and methodology released under open-access protocols with verifiable provenance.

pillars.title: Reproducibility
pillars.summary: Mandatory replication packages, registered reports, and release-ready artifact requirements for funded work.

pillars.title: Interdisciplinary Platforms
pillars.summary: Cross-ministry research platforms connecting computation, biotechnology, quantum methods, and social science.

pillars.title: Citizen Science
pillars.summary: Governed participation pathways for non-specialist contributors under ethics review and protocol attestation.

pillars.title: Evidence Stewardship
pillars.summary: Long-term preservation of datasets, models, and review artifacts in sovereign research repositories.

research.title: Open Knowledge Graph
research.summary: Protocol-indexed knowledge graph for verifiable citations, reproducible methods, and open research artifacts.

research.title: Climate Adaptation Observatory
research.summary: Distributed sensor network with sovereign data provenance, calibration records, and published model weights.

research.title: Quantum Methods Registry
research.summary: Benchmark suite and reproducible protocol for near-term quantum algorithms under Protocol v3.0 attestation.

research.title: Biosecurity Open Data Pilot
research.summary: Governed release of de-identified observational datasets with ethics review and access-audit logs.

research.title: Citizen Science Assembly
research.summary: Annual review of contributed datasets, replication findings, and authorship attribution for volunteer researchers.

policy.title: Open-Access Mandate v3
policy.summary: All protocol-funded research must publish in open-access venues with machine-readable artifacts within twelve months.

policy.title: Reproducibility Standards
policy.summary: Mandatory replication packages, deterministic environment specs, and registered-report submission for funded studies.

policy.title: Research Ethics Framework
policy.summary: Protocol-aligned ethics review, informed-attestation workflows, and risk classification for human-subject and environmental research.

policy.title: Sovereign Data Retention
policy.summary: Minimum retention periods, redundant sovereign storage nodes, and cryptographic integrity checks for research artifacts.

standards.title: Citation Provenance Standard
standards.summary: Deterministic citation identifiers, dependency graph exports, and tamper-evident provenance chains.

standards.title: Artifact Packaging Spec
standards.summary: Containerized, signed, and reproducible release bundles for code, data, models, and computational notebooks.

standards.title: Replication Report Schema
standards.summary: Machine-readable schema for independent replication reports, divergence notes, and verdict attestations.

standards.title: Sensitive Data Tiering
standards.summary: Classification tiers for embargoed, proprietary, personal, and sovereign research data with access-control mappings.
